task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard is named 'Capacity Planning Q4'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Capacity Planning Q4' displayed as the dashboard name at the top of the Graphite interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the first graph is titled 'P95 CPU Utilization'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'P95 CPU Utilization' displayed above one of the graphs.

task_completion.description: Verify the first graph uses the correct percentileOfSeries function and wildcard pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the target string 'percentileOfSeries(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.utilization, 95)' in the graph's legend, tooltip, or metric editor.

task_completion.description: Verify the second graph is titled 'CPU Variability'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'CPU Variability' displayed above the second graph.

task_completion.description: Verify the second graph uses the correct stddevSeries function and wildcard pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the target string 'stddevSeries(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.utilization)' in the graph's legend, tooltip, or metric editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Graphite web UI being used, rather than terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the graphs actually render data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs should display plotted lines, indicating real metric data is being queried and not just an empty configuration.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't bypass the UI by editing the dashboard JSON file directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of a text editor (like nano or vim) modifying dashboard JSON files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is exactly 'Capacity Planning Q4'. The expected graph titles are 'P95 CPU Utilization' and 'CPU Variability'. The first graph must use percentileOfSeries with a percentile of 95 and the wildcard pattern servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.utilization. The second graph must use stddevSeries with the same wildcard pattern.
